content: By 2025, self-supervised autonomous agents can evolve their own intrinsic curiosity modules that act as recursively self-improving "internal agents", where each sub-agent independently explores unobserved parts of the environment and memory to generate its own self-supervised learning signals without top-down human oversight. This nested agent architecture leverages 2024-2025 advances in scalable active memory to turn a single autonomous agent into a decentralized colony of curiosity-driven learners.
